falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4200 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break of the August 2024 lows would invalidate the 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug, as that bottom held at ~4400; this would signal a much deeper structural break than the modeled scenario

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Persistent VIX above 35 would contradict the blowoff score of 39 (which suggests moderate fear, not panic), indicating the market is in capitulation rather than a bottoming pattern; this would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal as it implies unresolved selling pressure

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.50% on a closing basis
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sub-3.50% 10Y would signal flight-to-safety panic or recession pricing inconsistent with an equity bottom formation; the August 2024 bottom occurred with yields ~3.85%, so this divergence would break the pattern match and suggest macro conditions have deteriorated beyond the modeled scenario

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
